commands: for file in docs/validation/V4_P0_T1_AUTH_SESSION_HARDENING.json docs/validation/V4_P0_T2_COMPLIANCE_LEGAL_DATA.json docs/validation/V4_P0_T3_ENTERPRISE_ACCESS_CONTROL.json docs/validation/V4_P1_T1_UNIFIED_TELEMETRY.json docs/validation/V4_P1_T2_ALERTING_RUNBOOKS.json docs/validation/V4_P1_T3_LOGGING_AUDIT_TRAIL.json docs/validation/V4_P2_T1_FRONTEND_PERFORMANCE.json docs/validation/V4_P2_T2_BACKEND_API_PERFORMANCE.json docs/validation/V4_P2_T3_LOAD_DEGRADATION.json docs/validation/V4_P3_T1_RELEASE_GATE_ENTERPRISE.json docs/validation/V4_P3_T2_ROLLBACK_CONTINUITY.json; do test -f "$file" || exit 1; done && echo "V4 artifacts: OK"
